title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 56.120 - When sick, court to appoint substitute
text:
56.120.  When sick, court to appoint substitute. — If he be sick or absent, such court shall appoint some person to discharge the duties of the office until the proper officer resumes the discharge of his duties.
(RSMo 1939 § 12949) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11323; 1919 § 743; 1909 § 1013
